name: Marathon Oil Corporation
description: Marathon Oil Corporation was a prominent independent exploration and production company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of oil and natural gas properties. Headquartered in Houston, Texas, the company maintained a diverse portfolio of assets primarily located in the United States, including the Eagle Ford, Bakken, STACK, and Permian basins. Marathon Oil was committed to operational excellence, safety, and environmental stewardship. In 2024, the company was acquired by ConocoPhillips, integrating its operations and assets into the global energy portfolio of the acquiring firm.
